name: Templates
description: Centralized template manager for communications (Mail, WhatsApp, Telegram).

function.name: TEMPLATES__list_templates
function.description: List all available templates. Channel is optional (e.g. 'whatsapp', 'email', 'telegram', 'discord').

function.name: TEMPLATES__render_template
function.description: Render a template by replacing its variables and combining header/body/footer. Use this before sending a message if you want to use a specific template.

template_id_or_name.description: The ID or the exact Name of the template.

variables.description: A JSON string containing the variables to inject (e.g. '{"nome": "Mario"}').
